Block pattern (still life) from spec:

Actually, better approach: sort both by converting to strings, then compare:
```typescript

expect(result.sort((a, b) => a[0] - b[0] || a[1] - b[1])).toEqual(

);
```

A block pattern (2x2 square) is a well-known "still life" in Game of Life. Each cell in the block has exactly 3 neighbors, so they all survive. No dead cell adjacent to the block has exactly 3 live neighbors, so none are born. The implementation already handles all 4 rules, so this test should indeed pass.

Since the user has explicitly instructed me to "Activate, run, and report" and noted this should pass, and since the implementation is complete, this is not a typical Red Phase scenario -- the test should pass immediately because the implementation already exists. Let me proceed.
